pain_points.text: Lead and support FedRAMP Moderate/High and IC ATO authorization processes
pain_points.jd_anchor: Lead and support FedRAMP Moderate/High and IC ATO authorization processes
pain_points.stakes: Successfully managing ATO authorization processes ensures that systems meet federal security standards and can operate securely within the Intelligence Community and FedRAMP frameworks.

pain_points.text: Develop, review, and maintain security documentation including System Security Plans (SSP), Security Assessment Reports (SAR), and Plan of Action & Milestones (POA&M)
pain_points.jd_anchor: Develop, review, and maintain security documentation: System Security Plans (SSP), Security Assessment Reports (SAR), Plan of Action & Milestones (POA&M)
pain_points.stakes: Accurate and up-to-date security documentation is critical for compliance, audit readiness, and effective risk management.

pain_points.text: Perform risk assessments, control assessments, and gap analyses to ensure compliance with NIST SP 800-53 / 800-37 RMF and FedRAMP baselines
pain_points.jd_anchor: Perform risk assessments, control assessments, and gap analyses
pain_points.stakes: Identifying and addressing security gaps and risks is essential to maintain compliance and protect sensitive systems from vulnerabilities.

pain_points.text: Execute continuous monitoring strategies and reporting, including tracking and managing POA&M remediation activities
pain_points.jd_anchor: Execute continuous monitoring strategies and reporting
pain_points.stakes: Continuous monitoring enables timely detection and remediation of security issues, maintaining system integrity and compliance over time.

pain_points.text: Support incident response and forensic analysis to investigate and mitigate security events
pain_points.jd_anchor: Support incident response and forensic analysis
pain_points.stakes: Effective incident response and forensic analysis minimize damage from security incidents and improve organizational resilience.

pain_points.text: Utilize security tools such as Splunk, Sentinel, RSA Archer, and ServiceNow for monitoring, compliance, and reporting
pain_points.jd_anchor: Utilize security tools for monitoring and compliance: Splunk, Sentinel, Vulnerability management tools, RSA Archer, ServiceNow
pain_points.stakes: Proficiency with security tools is necessary to efficiently monitor security posture, automate compliance workflows, and support audit processes.

candidate_evidence.summary: Coursework comparing CMMC v1/v2 levels and mapping controls to NIST SP 800-171, demonstrating understanding of compliance frameworks and control mapping.
Mapped workflows and tech environment to security and implementation risks during a planned migration, showing risk assessment and compliance awareness.
Presented migration risks and security considerations to stakeholders, indicating experience with security documentation and communication.
Wrote assessment-objective explanations for monitoring controls and CUI handling, showing documentation skills aligned with compliance requirements.
Performed risk assessment by mapping workflows and tech environment to security and privacy risks during migration planning.
Built SAST reporting workflow that normalized severity and correlated vulnerability details to improve remediation prioritization.
Correlated vulnerability details to improve visibility into remediation priorities, supporting risk assessment and management.
Designed security automation workflows for vulnerability discovery and remediation tracking with alerting and approval gates.
Built monitoring and approval-gate workflows to detect automation failures and route remediation through human review.
Designed incident response playbook with business impact analysis and recovery prioritization, demonstrating incident response fundamentals.
Performed network traffic analysis with Wireshark to identify anomalies and support troubleshooting, relevant to forensic analysis.
Deployed Graylog stack with log forwarding and alert conditions for Linux and Windows events, showing experience with security monitoring tools.
Built SAST reporting workflow using Python and Excel automation to produce stakeholder-ready vulnerability reports.

missing_evidence.note: No direct experience leading FedRAMP or IC ATO authorization processes; only adjacent coursework and risk assessment exposure.
No direct experience developing or maintaining formal SSP, SAR, or POA&M documentation; evidence limited to related presentations and coursework.
No direct incident response or forensic analysis in production environments; experience limited to coursework and network traffic analysis.
No direct experience with Splunk, Sentinel, RSA Archer, or ServiceNow; experience limited to Graylog and Python-based reporting tools.
